'''Hebeth''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moonless]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that occupied the third [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Beheboth (star)|Beheboth]] in the [[Beheboth system/Legends|Beheboth system]],<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" /> which was located in the [[Sanbra sector/Legends|Sanbra sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="EA Outer Rim" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Hebeth's surface consisted of [[Magma/Legends|molten rock]].<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hebeth was first mentioned in "Return to Prosperity," the first ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' article in the series ''[[Beheboth: Blood and Water]]''. The article was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Wizards.com|website]] on [[June 3]], [[2004]].<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Beheboth [[Star system/Legends|system]], and by extension Hebeth, in grid square O-17.<ref name="TEA" />
